reviews.review_description: Login won’t work I put everything correct

Apparently IG views this app as a third party app and against their ToS. I charged up my quest and when I noticed the IG icon changed, I clicked on it and was notified it was discontinued. I then got an email that my IG account was suspended.

I didn’t get through to sign in. A lot of us use more longer complex passwords and while the keyboard in augmented reality is fun from a simplistic point of view it’s a nightmare to use when trying to actually type out your password. I would have thought being a meta owned company they would have made it easier to auto log in if we are logged in with the meta to then sign in to Instagram. You guys really really need to let us sign into these apps on our phones first so we can then get into the app in augmented reality. Also it’s a bit buggy even from the sign in form, it kept vanishing on me. Extremely frustrating experience.
It’s still in beta it’s still being tested for virtual reality it’s pretty dang sick
Its the same as ig
I have tried everything I can to log in. I understand it's a beta but doesn't work at all for me. Can't log in and can't get past the first screen. Doesn't even give me the option to try

Downloaded to my q3 headset and tried it for the first time. Then app completely disappeared. Tried checking App Store and it says I already purchased the app. Tried to launch via my phone app but to no avail and it froze my headset.

reviews.review_title: I’m stuck on the screen need for a code
reviews.review_description: I’ve tryed logging out and turning of my oculus but it hasn’t worked the code is still on my screen and I can get it off, I’ve even tryed restarting my oculus and it is still stuck on it.

reviews.review_title: How do i post on vr headset
reviews.review_description: Anytime i try to make a post on my headset it says select from device and when i click it my screen goes black for a second then i cant get past the select from device screen. Also certain pictures with music playing doesnt have the music on here

As the title says its good but I hate the fact that even with the app disappearing messages and hidden ones that require the app don't show up like my phone was dead and my friend was showing me messages but I couldn't see any of them so I couldn't even laugh at them so I would really live to see this fixed. Naturally its 5 stars but because I'm petty it gets 4
When you enlarge the screen and turn your head left and right, things like ghosting happen and the quest is completely broken.
